case_title: UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS AND DOOR VS. PERSONA JEWELRY

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
